name: guide-map-handdrawn-workflow
description: Deterministic hand-drawn map rendering workflow for pixel-aligned native map overlays.

scripts.export:xixi:attractions: node scripts/export-attractions.js --in data/xixi-wetland.osm.geojson --spec data/attractions/xixi-attractions.spec.json --out data/attractions/xixi-attractions.json --sourceCoordinateSystem WGS84 --targetCoordinateSystem GCJ02
scripts.render:xixi:watercolor: node scripts/render-handdrawn-map.js --config config/xixi-wetland.viewport.json --data data/xixi-wetland.osm.geojson --style styles/watercolor.json --out output/styles/xixi-watercolor.svg --manifest output/styles/xixi-watercolor-overlay.json
scripts.render:xixi:ink: node scripts/render-handdrawn-map.js --config config/xixi-wetland.viewport.json --data data/xixi-wetland.osm.geojson --style styles/ink.json --out output/styles/xixi-ink.svg --manifest output/styles/xixi-ink-overlay.json
scripts.render:xixi:storybook: node scripts/render-handdrawn-map.js --config config/xixi-wetland.viewport.json --data data/xixi-wetland.osm.geojson --style styles/storybook.json --out output/styles/xixi-storybook.svg --manifest output/styles/xixi-storybook-overlay.json
scripts.render:xixi:path-emphasis: node scripts/render-handdrawn-map.js --config config/xixi-wetland.viewport.json --data data/xixi-wetland.osm.geojson --style styles/path-emphasis.json --out output/styles/xixi-path-emphasis.svg --manifest output/styles/xixi-path-emphasis-overlay.json
scripts.render:xixi:jiangnan: node scripts/render-handdrawn-map.js --config config/xixi-wetland.viewport.json --data data/xixi-wetland.osm.geojson --style styles/jiangnan-guide.json --out output/styles/xixi-jiangnan-guide.svg --manifest output/styles/xixi-jiangnan-guide-overlay.json
scripts.render:xixi:styles: npm run render:xixi:watercolor && npm run render:xixi:ink && npm run render:xixi:storybook && npm run render:xixi:path-emphasis && npm run render:xixi:jiangnan
scripts.validate:xixi:styles: node scripts/validate-overlay.js --manifest output/styles/xixi-watercolor-overlay.json --svg output/styles/xixi-watercolor.svg && node scripts/validate-overlay.js --manifest output/styles/xixi-ink-overlay.json --svg output/styles/xixi-ink.svg && node scripts/validate-overlay.js --manifest output/styles/xixi-storybook-overlay.json --svg output/styles/xixi-storybook.svg && node scripts/validate-overlay.js --manifest output/styles/xixi-path-emphasis-overlay.json --svg output/styles/xixi-path-emphasis.svg && node scripts/validate-overlay.js --manifest output/styles/xixi-jiangnan-guide-overlay.json --svg output/styles/xixi-jiangnan-guide.svg
